verses.1: A Psalm of David. Vindicate me, LORD, for I have walked in my integrity, And I have trusted in the LORD without wavering.
verses.2: Examine me, LORD, and put me to the test; Refine my mind and my heart.
verses.3: For Your goodness is before my eyes, And I have walked in Your truth.
verses.4: I do not sit with deceitful people, Nor will I go with pretenders.
verses.5: I hate the assembly of evildoers, And I will not sit with the wicked.
verses.6: I will wash my hands in innocence, And I will go around Your altar, LORD,
verses.7: That I may proclaim with the voice of thanksgiving And declare all Your wonders.
verses.8: LORD, I love the dwelling of Your house, And the place where Your glory remains.
verses.9: Do not take my soul away along with sinners, Nor my life with men of bloodshed,
verses.10: In whose hands is a wicked scheme, And whose right hand is full of bribes.
verses.11: But as for me, I will walk in my integrity; Redeem me, and be gracious to me.
verses.12: My foot stands on level ground; In the congregations I will bless the LORD.
